svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="draw.io" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="graph-flow" name="Graph Mode数据流"> <mxGraphModel dx="2054" dy="1103" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1"
